tasks.subject: Task 1: Add per-provider exclusion config fields
tasks.description:
Add ExcludedVodStreamIds/ExcludedSeriesIds to ProviderConfig; include both in SnapshotService.CalculateConfigFingerprint; tests for defaults + fingerprint changes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/ProviderConfig.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/SnapshotService.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/PluginConfigurationTests.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/SnapshotServiceTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~PluginConfigurationTests|FullyQualifiedName~SnapshotServiceTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Exclusion arrays default to empty int[]", "Fingerprint differs on VOD exclusion change", "Fingerprint differs on Series exclusion change", "Existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Sync-time exclusion filtering
tasks.description:
Create internal static ContentExclusionFilter (BuildSet/IsExcluded); skip excluded StreamId/SeriesId in the VOD/Series fetch loops of StrmSyncService; unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/ContentExclusionFilter.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/StrmSyncService.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/ContentExclusionFilterTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ContentExclusionFilterTests|FullyQualifiedName~StrmSyncServiceTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BuildSet handles null/empty/dupes", "VOD loop skips excluded StreamId", "Series loop skips excluded SeriesId", "Empty set is no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: API endpoints to list items in a category
tasks.description:
Add ContentItemDto/SeriesItemDto and GET Streams/Vod + Series/List endpoints to SyncController (mirror GetVodCategories); update CLAUDE.md table; controller tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Api/SyncController.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Api/SyncControllerTests.cs", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~SyncControllerTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GetVodStreams unconfigured → BadRequest", "GetSeriesList unconfigured → BadRequest", "Mapped DTOs ordered by Num then Name", "Build warning-clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Config UI — per-provider exclusion state (load/save)
tasks.description:
Track excludedVodStreamIds/excludedSeriesIds per provider in config.js: state init, makeDefaultProvider defaults, load in loadProviderIntoUI, save in updateActiveProviderFromUI.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: devtools getPluginConfiguration round-trip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["makeDefaultProvider has both exclusion arrays", "Provider switch loads arrays", "Save writes arrays back", "Old config defaults to [] without error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Config UI — expand category + per-item checkboxes
tasks.description:
Generalize renderCategoryList vod/series branch to expandable rows; add toggleContentCategory/fetchContentItemsForCategory/renderContentItems/updateContentExclusion mirroring Live TV; CSS check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.js", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.html"], "verifyCommand": "manual: expand category, untick items, sync, confirm STRMs absent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Expand button on vod/series rows", "Lazy-load + cache items", "Checked = category selected AND not excluded", "Uncheck/recheck updates exclusion list", "Select/Deselect all + auto-tick parent", "Deselected category greys items"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Version bump, docs, changelog, full verification
tasks.description:
Bump version to 1.37.0.0; document feature in README/ARCHITECTURE; full build+test; release is user-gated.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.csproj", "README.md", "docs/ARCHITECTURE.md", "docs/REQUIREMENTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build warning-clean", "Full test suite passes", "Version 1.37.0.0 in both fields", "README documents per-item selection"]}
```
